sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75842" key="ou)loki/kinna" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐλο-κίκιννα</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[κῐκ]</pron>, poet.for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὖλοι κίκιννοι</foreign> (cf. <sense id="n75842.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οὐλοκάρηνος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0363.tlg007:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Telesill.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.23</biblScope> </bibl> (Bgk.(<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope> </bibl>) reads <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὐλοκίκιννος</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
